comment: Single source of truth for the gzipped JS size budget (KB), enforced by scripts/check-bundle-size.mjs. Bump deliberately when a real capability lands on the EAGER path. The check measures only the eager entry chunk(s) referenced by dist/index.html; lazy (dynamically-imported) chunks are excluded. The editor (Workspace: the React Flow + dagre canvas, inspector, and header) is lazy-loaded via React.lazy in App.tsx, so it is NOT in this budget — only the Start landing + app shell + domain + dagre (used by Start's tree previews) + React load eagerly. History: M1 raised it 80 -> 165 for the canvas core; Session 7 165 -> 168 for the expanded template library on Start; then lazy-loading Workspace dropped the eager entry to ~100 KB, so the budget was tightened 168 -> 115 to lock the win in (a regression that re-bundles the canvas eagerly would blow past it). Heavy/optional libs (export: pptxgenjs/jspdf) are code-split too, so they don't count here.
